title: Serving Different Content Types
description: Respond with HTML, JSON, and other content types.

slides.title: Setting the Content-Type Header 📋
slides.content:
# Content Negotiation

The `Content-Type` header tells the client what kind of data you're sending.

Common values:
- `text/plain` – plain text
- `text/html` – HTML
- `application/json` – JSON
- `image/png` – PNG image
- `text/css` – CSS

Set it in `res.writeHead` or with `res.setHeader`.

slides.title: Serving HTML
Serving JSON
slides.content: Respond with JSON data (commonly for APIs):

quizData.question: What Content-Type header should you use for JSON data?
quizData.explanation: `application/json` is the correct MIME type for JSON.
